notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.question: Does DJ Horizon require their own dedicated engineer?

notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.body:
Thanks for pointing this out. Your festival sound engineer will be sufficient, as long as they're available during DJ Horizon's set to ensure levels are properly maintained and to respond to any technical issues.
I've attached a revised contract with this clarification in section 5.3. The rest remains unchanged.
Let me know if you have any other questions.

notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.body:
Perfect, thank you for the clarification and the revised contract.
I've attached the signed contract and proof of payment for the deposit (€1,100). The transfer was made this morning and should arrive in your account within 1-2 business days.
Also, I'd like to check if DJ Horizon would be available for a short (15-min) press interview via Zoom during the week before the festival? This would be part of our promotional activities.

notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.body:
Thank you for the signed contract and payment confirmation. We've received the deposit and I've attached the fully counter-signed contract.
Regarding the interview request, DJ Horizon is willing to do a 15-minute Zoom interview, but it would need to be scheduled at least two weeks before the event. Please contact our press coordinator, Emma Johnson (emma@stellarbookings.com), to arrange this closer to the date.
We'll be in touch again approximately one month before the event to finalize travel arrangements and other logistical details.

notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.body:
Hi Mike,
I hope this email finds you well. As mentioned, we're planning our first wave of artist announcements for Equinox Festival next week.
Attached are two options for the artwork featuring DJ Horizon. Could you please review and let us know which one you prefer? We're also happy to make adjustments if needed.
Also, I've noted the interview requirements and will connect with Emma closer to the event date as advised.
Looking forward to your feedback!
Best regards,
Stacey Summer
Vibrancy Events
+49 176 55443322 
<Equinox_DJHorizon_Option1.jpg>
<Equinox_DJHorizon_Option2.jpg>

notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.body:
Hi Sarah,
I've reviewed the artwork options with DJ Horizon's team. We prefer Option 2, but have two small requests:
1. Please use the attached updated artist photo, which is from their recent press kit
2. Could you adjust the font size of DJ Horizon's name to match the other headliners?
Once these changes are made, you're good to go with the announcement.
Best regards,
<DJ_Horizon_Press_Photo_2025.jpg>

notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.body:
Hi Mike,
Thanks for the quick feedback. I've attached the revised artwork with the updated photo and adjusted font size as requested.
We'll proceed with the announcement on Monday (June 16th) across our social media channels and website. The full lineup announcement press release will go out the following day.
As we get closer to the event, I'll reach out about the remaining payment and to coordinate travel details.
Thanks again for your cooperation!
Best regards,
Stacey Summer
Vibrancy Events
+49 176 55443322
